chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1708 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7343/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 20.12.2023 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Abdul Majid Dahraj of Police Station Tharu Shah..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Comments have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3. Petitioners’ Counsel submits that today medical board’s meeting is scheduled to examine petitioner No.1 for determining her age. He has placed on record a photocopy of order dated 15.12.2023 issued by Director General, Health Services Sindh, Hyderabad in this regard. Complainant of FIR No.174 of 2023, registered at Police Station Tharu Shah is present along with his family and submits that she has no objection if the subject FIR is quashed as she does not want to pursue the case. IO submits that he has already recorded statement of petitioner No.1 U/S 161 CrPC, and she reiterated that she has got married out of her own freewill. Complainant party concedes that petitioner No.1 is about 17/18 years. In view of above, IO is directed to dispose of the case in view of aforesaid statement of petitioner No.1 and submit such report before the Magistrate concerned, who shall pass an order in view of the recommendations of the IO, however, after the medical examination of petitioner No.1, such report shall be submitted for a perusal in chamber.

Complainant party concedes that petitioner No.1 is about 17/18 years. In view of above, IO is directed to dispose of the case in view of aforesaid statement of petitioner No.1 and submit such report before the Magistrate concerned, who shall pass an order in view of the recommendations of the IO, however, after the medical examination of petitioner No.1, such report shall be submitted for a perusal in chamber. The petition is disposed of along with listed application, in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
